pageContext.name: Wilma Flintstone
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Wilma Flintstone! Based on original references from The Flintstones, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Flintstones fans, don't miss your chance to add Wilma Flintstone to your Flintstones collection!
